message:
refactor(cli): extract error helper, clean imports, improve code organization

- Extract writeJsonError() helper in copy.ts to replace inline
  console.log(JSON.stringify({error:...})) calls, ensuring consistent
  structured JSON error formatting across variable_error, cancelled,
  and missing_variables error paths
- Remove unused imports (readSyncMeta, formatSyncAge, type SyncedPrompt)
  from search.ts that are no longer referenced after prior refactoring
- Move version import from mid-file to top-level import block in
  utilities.ts, following standard JS/TS import ordering conventions
- Add eslint-disable comment for intentional 'any' type usage during
  config section parsing in config.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
